post.content:
**Round 1 - Screening round**
variation of https://leetcode.com/problems/walls-and-gates/description/ 
(a number of comuters on a nxm grid are infected with a virus that is spreading at every direction (u,d,l,r) every hour, return how long until all are infected)

**Round 2 - onsite**
1. Collaboration & Leadership, Design & Architecture -
First 20 minutes was to give detail about a project I led focusing on design and architecture.
The second half was "Tell me a time when... " style questions

2. Algorithms & Data Structures (Coding 1) -
Given a list of meeting room IDs, implement an efficient way to schedule a meeting given a start and finish time. return the room ID if there is an available room, or INVALID if there are no rooms available.
Example:  
	- init([RoomA, RoomB, RoomC])
	- book([2,4]) // returns a room (e.g. RoomA)
	- book([2,4]) // returns a room different than previous room (e.g. RoomB)
	- book([5,6]) // returns any room
	- book([1,5]) // // returns a room different than 2 previously booked (e.g. RoomC)
	- book([2,4]) // // returns INVALID because all are booked in the given slot


	follow up questions:
	- How would you change the solution to support booking cancellation
	- How would I change the solution in a multithreaded environment

3. Depth in Specialization (Coding 2) -
https://leetcode.com/problems/trapping-rain-water/

4. Design & Architecture -
Design Uber Eats

Awesome, congratulations!! I have an L5A interview coming up (SF). I have a couple of questions, if you could chime in, I would greatly appreciate it.
1. For the Depth in Specialization (Coding) round, it it like a Leetcode simulation problem in general? Or LLDs? I haven't prepared design patterns at all !!
2. Any tips on acing the behavioral tell me about a time questions? What are some aspects they like to focus on? Recruiter mentioned collaboration + leadership. Any other tips?

Thanks for sharing your experience!
They asked hard level question in the interview :( Trap rain water

Phone screen looks like - https://leetcode.com/problems/rotting-oranges
DSA - https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-question/object-oriented-design/490962/Design-Meeting-Scheduler

What did you implement for a meeting scheduler? Keep intervals sorted + lower bound? Or just a brute force? Or a segment tree?
hi, how long after your phone technical did you get the onsite? and how long after onsite did you get the offer? ty!
